trivia_bullets.text: Urban Evolution is a Simic Combine card from Gatecrash (February 2013), carrying a Simic watermark. The Simic mechanic was evolve, inspired by Ethan Fleisher's Great Designer Search 2 submission, focused on adaptive biological engineering and the krasis hybrid creature type.

Flavor text: 'As the Simic released more of their krasis experiments, they required new habitats, always at the expense of the locals.' Frames Simic bioengineering expansion as social and ecological displacement.

Urban Evolution has 11 total printings (Gatecrash through Pioneer Masters 2024), all illustrated by Eytan Zana. Eytan Zana is also a concept artist for Naughty Dog (Uncharted, The Last of Us) and made his MTG debut in Innistrad (2011). The card has appeared in Duel Decks: Elspeth vs. Kiora, Modern Masters 2017, The List, RNA Guild Kit, Commander 2019, Commander Legends, New Capenna Commander, Modern Horizons 3 Commander, and Pioneer Masters.

EDHREC rank 2,194. The draw-3-plus-land-drop effect is a Commander staple for Simic ramp strategies; repeated reprints across 11 sets signal sustained demand. Pauper ineligible (uncommon); legal in Pioneer, Modern, Legacy, Historic, Commander.

related_cards.name: Explore
related_cards.note: Predecessor effect at 2 mana; Urban Evolution is the scaled-up Simic version

related_cards.name: Cultivate
related_cards.note: Classic Simic ramp spell frequently paired with Urban Evolution in commander packages

related_cards.name: Elusive Krasis
related_cards.note: Exemplar krasis creature from same set; connects spell to depicted creature type
